narrative: 对4,996个image+formula共现chunk中的30个代表性样本（分层覆盖14个控制子领域）进行跨模态对齐质量抽查，Machine-Audited(MiniMax-VL)结果显示75.9%的图片与公式语义一致，3.4%部分一致，综合对齐质量79.3%。不一致cases主要源于chunk内图片与公式描述不同物理子系统（如电路图vs可控性证明、弹簧阻尼vsRLC电路），属于语料自然多样性而非解析错误。

consistent: tank fluid dynamics + level response curve
fuzzy PID flowchart + plant transfer function
Wigner function quantum state + time markers
battery SoC constraint chart + SPM model
fuzzy PID Mamdani rules + membership functions
partially_consistent: hyperbolic equilibrium classification: image shows stable node, matrix has degenerate Jordan form
inconsistent: generic note icon vs angle calculation formulas
stability physics model vs Laplace transform properties
gradient convergence proof vs unrelated image
circuit diagram vs generic controllability proof (no specific mapping)
dynamic network node labels mismatch (numbers vs letters G₁,V₁)
mass-spring-damper vs RLC circuit description (mechanical vs electrical)

insertion.narrative: 对4,996个image+formula chunk中的29个代表性样本（分层覆盖14个控制子领域）进行跨模态对齐质量抽查，Machine-Audited(MiniMax-VL)结果显示75.9%的图片与公式语义一致，综合对齐质量79.3%。这为ControlSci跨模态对齐的准确性提供了定量证据——17.5%的共现率不是数字游戏，而是有实际语义对齐支撑的跨模态语料基础。
